# tf_file_export

*This page will be auto-generated by stardoc.*

Export processed modules to filesystem.

```starlark
load("@rules_tf2//tf2:def.bzl", "tf_file_export")

tf_file_export(
    name = "export",
    module = ":my_module",
)
```

Usage:
```bash
bazel run //:export /tmp/output
```

See [Rules Overview](README.md) for more information.
